# Factions

Organizations, guilds, cults, armies, noble houses, thieves' networks — any group with shared goals.

Members are tracked through character entries that list the faction in their `factions` field.

## Schema
- type: faction
- name, alignment
- headquarters: wiki-link to location
- leader: wiki-link to character
- tags: freeform list

## Contents
(empty — world not yet created)
